stocks.impact_theory: Escalating US-Iran tensions and Middle East conflict drive oil prices higher, boosting upstream producers like APA. Economic implications include higher energy costs, inflation pressures; market psychology shifts to risk-on for commodities amid safe-haven flows. Historical parallels: 2019 Iran tanker attacks spiked oil 10%+. Analogies: Like fueling a rocket (geopolitics igniting energy rally); pouring gasoline on a bonfire (tensions amplifying price surges).

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Premarket +8%, analyst upgrades (Wolfe to $39 PT), X sentiment positive on oil spike from Iran conflict (posts highlight supply risks). Web news confirms gap-up on upgrades and crude surge.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 10-15% gains on sustained oil >$80/bbl
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Quick resolution, SPR releases, broader market selloff.

stocks.justification: Strong premarket move, aligned X/web sentiment, clear catalyst.

stocks.impact_theory: Iran conflict risks Strait of Hormuz disruptions, spiking crude prices and benefiting OXY's Permian assets. Implications: Higher input costs for consumers, boosted producer margins; psychology favors energy amid uncertainty. Parallels: 2022 Ukraine war oil rally. Analogies: Ship in a storm (geopolitics tossing oil prices up); Buffett's favorite horse getting steroids (Warren backing + tensions).

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: New 12m high, premarket +6.65%, X posts bullish on oil surge (calls flooding, upgrades expected), news ties to Exxon/Chevron rally on Middle East risks.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Sanctioned oil flood, economic slowdown curbing demand.

stocks.justification: Consistent mentions in gainers, strong X energy bid sentiment.

stocks.impact_theory: Geopolitical escalation boosts defense spending, missiles/aerospace demand for RTX. Implications: Fiscal stimulus via contracts, risk-off rotation; psychology sees 'wartime winners'. Parallels: Post-9/11 defense surge. Analogies: Arms dealer at a bar fight (profiting from chaos); shield in a swordfight (protection premium rises).

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: New 1y high +6.41% premarket, X highlights missile demand amid Iran strikes, news on wartime targets/upgrades.

stocks.justification: Clear theme but less volume vs energy.

stocks.impact_theory: Q4 earnings beat EPS but miss revenue, weak 2026 guidance ($2.38 EPS vs exp), new CEO flags missteps. Implications: Margin pressure, deleveraging delay; psychology shifts to caution on consumer spending. Parallels: Post-COVID cruise resets. Analogies: Captain hitting iceberg (guidance miss); party boat running out of fuel (yield flat).

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: -10% drop, X bearish on lowered FY26 guide, revenue miss, web confirms tumble on outlook.

stocks.impact_theory: Iran war disrupts fertilizer supply (urea/ammonia via Hormuz), energy costs up; benefits US producers. Implications: Agri input inflation, food prices; psychology to commodities. Parallels: 2022 energy crisis fertilizer spike. Analogies: Farmer's gold rush (prices jumping); ripple from oil pond (energy feeds fertilizers).

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: +11% premarket, news/X on 12.8% fert prices jump from Hormuz, new 1y high.

stocks.justification: Indirect catalyst but tied to energy theme.
